name: Grounding Bolt
reqs: grounding_bolt := 90r HVY or 90r LHT or 90r MED, 90s LTN
additional_info: 10 second cooldown. Procs on lightning strikes caused from Scorched Peak, Fulgurite Formation, the Specialist Set equipment Talents, and Storm/Stormbreaker enchantments during the rain.
desc: Anytime you summon a lightning strike on your opponent, apply knockdown if it lands.
